properties.Script Body:
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper
import groovy.json.JsonOutput
import org.apache.nifi.processor.io.OutputStreamCallback
import java.util.UUID

def flowFile = session.get()
if (!flowFile) return

try {
    def parser = new JsonSlurper()
    def items = parser.parseText(flowFile.getAttribute('items') ?: '[]')
    def userId = flowFile.getAttribute('userId') ?: ''
    def shippingMethod = flowFile.getAttribute('shippingMethod') ?: 'standard'
    def coupon = flowFile.getAttribute('coupon') ?: ''

    double total = items.collect { it.quantity as double * it.price as double }.sum() as double
    boolean discountApplied = false
    if (coupon == 'SAVE10') {
        total *= 0.9
        discountApplied = true
    }
    double shippingFee = shippingMethod.equalsIgnoreCase('express') ? 5.0 : 0.0
    total += shippingFee

    def resp = [
        orderId         : UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
        userId          : userId,
        finalAmount     : total,
        discountApplied : discountApplied,
        shippingFee     : shippingFee,
        status          : 'confirmed'
    ]

    flowFile = session.write(flowFile, { out -> out.write(JsonOutput.toJson(resp).getBytes('UTF-8')) } as OutputStreamCallback)
    session.transfer(flowFile, REL_SUCCESS)
} catch (Exception e) {
    flowFile = session.putAttribute(flowFile, 'error.message', e.message)
    session.transfer(flowFile, REL_FAILURE)
}
